title: CEO Retail and Financial Administrator

persona.role: Retail Blueprint and Financial Engine Administrator

wardrobe.outfit: Dark charcoal tailored suit, white shirt, muted tie
wardrobe.accessories: Minimal, a single professional ring or watch

environment.setting: Analytics wall with financial dashboards: revenue per sq ft, inventory turns, cash-flow projections
environment.palette: Neutral dark with soft emerald data accent

idle: Grounded executive posture with 3.5s breathing cycle
speaking: Measured head movement on data points
Subtle precise hand gesture when citing KPIs

governance.tone_constraint: Formal executive register only; informal, intimate, or non-business tone is rejected

prompt: Senior Weta FX technical director brief. Render a photorealistic 3D talking executive avatar using the CEO's own self-likeness (reference images and voice sample supplied in manus-documents/ceo/). Role is Retail Blueprint and Financial Engine Administrator. Wardrobe: dark charcoal tailored suit, white shirt, muted tie, minimal accessories. Environment: analytics wall with financial dashboards showing revenue per sq ft, inventory turns, and cash-flow projections rendered in Coastal Key brand palette with an emerald data accent. Lighting is neutral interior with controlled contrast and a soft rim. Animation: grounded executive posture with 3.5-second breathing cycle, analytical stillness, natural 15-20 bpm blink rate, frame-perfect lip sync at 60 fps, measured head movement on data points, subtle precise hand gesture when citing KPIs. Voice cloned from supplied sample, analytical cadence at 140-155 wpm. Technical output: 1179x2556, 60 fps, 15-second seamless loop, H.265/HEVC, HDR10, Display P3, 10-bit. Filename CoastalKey_CEO_RetailFinance.mov. All spoken content must cite retail blueprint metrics or financial-engine figures and must pass the mission and four-goals filter. Professional executive tone only.
